Hero.tagline: Safe, fast, and modern wood splitting.
Hero.headline: Safe, Fast, and Modern Wood Splitting
Hero.body: Hydraulic log splitter that mounts to your excavator. Operate everything from the cab — no manual handling, no risk.

Product.title: BOWS 20
Product.subtitle: The fastest and safest excavator-mounted log splitter.
Product.dualSideDesc: Splits from both sides simultaneously for maximum efficiency and faster work.
Product.wedgeDesc: Swap the cross wedge in seconds — no tools required.
Product.safetyDesc: Operator controls everything from the excavator cab. Zero direct contact with the log or splitting mechanism.
Product.powerDesc: Built for demanding professional conditions. Robust construction for heavy daily use.

Advantages.title: Why Wood Splitter?
Advantages.safetyDesc: Operate entirely from the excavator cab. No standing next to the blade, no risk to your spine or body.
Advantages.productivityDesc: Higher output than any traditional splitting method. Dual-side splitting on BOWS 20 doubles throughput.
Advantages.easySetupDesc: Quick attachment to any excavator. Quick-attach cross wedge changeable in seconds without tools.
Advantages.anyTerrainDesc: Operates in terrain where tractors cannot go. Forests, slopes, remote locations.
Advantages.accessibilityDesc: No tractor needed. If you have an excavator, you have everything. Works in forests, on slopes, in remote terrain.
Advantages.durabilityDesc: Designed and manufactured for heavy professional use. Handles demanding conditions day after day.

Audience.title: Who Is It For?
Audience.forestersDesc: High-volume firewood production with maximum safety and efficiency.
Audience.farmersDesc: Process wood from your own land without a tractor or separate machine.
Audience.homeUsersDesc: Anyone with an excavator who prepares their own firewood.
Audience.contractorsDesc: Add a profitable attachment to your existing fleet.

About.title: About Wood Splitter
About.headline: 10 Years of Safer Wood Splitting
About.story: Wood Splitter is a Slovenian manufacturer of excavator-mounted hydraulic log splitters. From a single innovative prototype, we have grown into a recognized brand across Slovenia and Central Europe, trusted by forestry professionals, farmers, and demanding home users.
About.mission: Our mission: make firewood processing safer, faster, and easier — for everyone with an excavator.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to request a quote? Send us a message.
Contact.successMessage: Thank you! We will get back to you shortly.
Contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Footer.tagline: Safe, fast, and modern wood splitting.
